package rulecoverage

func PositiveLikelyUnindexedQuery() string {
    ruleID := "likely_unindexed_query"
    family := "performance"
    severity := "contextual"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "Query shapes like leading-wildcard LIKE or ORDER BY without LIMIT that often scale poorly."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
